nl_query: For each board in EVAL_IN_PROGRESS status, show the course code, total scripts, number of scripts in each evaluation status, the board coordinator name and honorarium weight, and the number of calendar days remaining until the deadline.
failed_sql: SELECT au.code AS academic_unit_code, COUNT(a.id) AS total_scripts, SUM(CASE WHEN ea.status = 'NOT_ASSIGNED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scripts_not_assigned, SUM(CASE WHEN ea.status = 'ASSIGNED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scripts_assigned, SUM(CASE WHEN ea.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scripts_in_progress, SUM(CASE WHEN ea.status = 'FROZEN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scripts_frozen, SUM(CASE WHEN ea.status = 'SUBMITTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scripts_submitted, bc.name AS board_coordinator_name, bc.honorarium_weight AS honorarium_weight, COUNT(CASE WHEN ac.cal_date BETWEEN b.created_at::DATE AND b.deadline AND (ac.is_holiday = FALSE AND ac.is_weekend = FALSE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS days_remaining_until_deadline FROM academic_unit au JOIN board b ON au.id = b.course_id JOIN answer_script a ON a.course_id = b.course_id AND a.exam_id = b.exam_id JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.script_id = a.id LEFT JOIN academic_calendar ac ON ac.cal_date BETWEEN b.created_at::DATE AND b.deadline AND (ac.is_holiday = FALSE AND ac.is_weekend = FALSE) LEFT JOIN board_coordinator bc ON bc.board_id = b.id WHERE b.status = 'EVAL_IN_PROGRESS' GROUP BY au.code, bc.name, bc.honorarium_weight ORDER BY au.code, scripts_in_progress DESC
error: Validation failed (aggregation): GROUP BY uses a descriptive column (like name, title, or code) without including the primary key (id). Names and titles may not be unique. Always include the entity's 'id' column in the GROUP BY clause alongside the descriptive column.
